source_document.section: 1.4.1 Imposición Corporativa Primaria / Primary Corporate Imposition

flow_direction.operational_mechanism: Adjusted corporate income tax, surplus levy, externality pricing, ceiling enforcement (<=12000 PPP), VAF audit
Pan-European / Pan-Mediterranean infrastructure, uncontaminated education, 40-38-22 funds, public services without market mediation
Guaranteed floor >=1200 PPP, minimal/progressive individual imposition only between 1200-12000 PPP, zero extraction in vulnerability

operational_rules.title: Order inversion
operational_rules.statement: Corporations are legal vehicles aggregating extracted value (labour, environment, knowledge, public infrastructure). Their nature is circular, not retentive. Civilizational imposition begins here.

operational_rules.title: Shielded floor
operational_rules.statement: 1200 PPP is a dignity right, not a taxable base. Any fiscal, contractual, or algorithmic mechanism that erodes it is declared INCOMPATIBLE with DEGF section 5.2 (Workers' Rights / Fairness / Justice).

operational_rules.title: Structural ceiling
operational_rules.statement: 12000 PPP is not a fiscal limit; it is a circulation limit. All corporate or individual surplus above this level is automatically redirected to the civilizational commons fund, not to private accumulation.

operational_rules.title: Extended VAF filter
operational_rules.statement: Vendor admissibility requires corporate_tax_circulation >= 95%, executive_compensation <= ceiling, non-haven domicile, and verified dividend routing. Non-compliance blocks contracts and access to CP-2 pipelines.

operational_rules.title: Mandatory glossary
operational_rules.statement: From 2026-04-30, no fiscal, circulation, or distribution acronym operates without explicit declaration in README.md Annex E. Undeclared tokens are marked status: pending_glossary and automatically suspended in audit and compliance.

strategic_alignment.role: Faith in present-day Europeans and Mediterraneans is honoured by not making them the primary financing source; they are protected, not extracted.
Industrial competitiveness is admissible only if sustainable and regenerative; primary corporate circulation is the distributive sustainability mechanism.
Mandatory inheritance of Fairness, Justice, Workers' Rights, Legality, and Loyalty. Corporate imposition is architectural design, not retroactive patch.
Integration in capital models (25.0B EUR) as civilizational circulation. Personal dividends and executive bonuses auto-capped at <=12000 PPP/month.
Legal backbone for ceiling enforcement, non-haven domicile checks, and dividend routing verification.

notes: This TX resolves the deferral declared in README.md section 1.4.1 (PR-1, v2.4.1). Acronym declarations populated in Annex E by README v2.4.2.
